Employment.description: File complaints about unpaid wages, wrongful termination, and PF issues
additional: POSH complaints: Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) or Local Complaints Committee (LCC)

Cyber Crime.description: Report online fraud, hacking, identity theft, and social media abuse

Property & Housing.description: For property disputes, encroachment, and title issues
additional: RERA (builder disputes): varies by state — search 'state RERA'

Domestic Violence.primary: Protection Officer / Magistrate Court / Women's Helpline
Domestic Violence.description: For domestic violence, dowry harassment, and abuse

Consumer Rights.description: File consumer complaints for defective goods and deficient services

Criminal.primary: Nearest Police Station / District Sessions Court
Criminal.description: File FIR, apply for bail, seek legal aid for criminal matters
additional: High Court Legal Services Committee (for High Court matters)

Family Law.primary: Family Court / District Legal Services Authority
Family Law.description: For divorce, custody, maintenance, and matrimonial disputes

RTI.primary: Central Information Commission / State Information Commission

Education.primary: District Education Officer / University Grants Commission
Education.description: For education rights, fee disputes, and discrimination in educational institutions
additional: National Commission for Scheduled Castes: ncsc.nic.in

General.description: Free legal aid for all citizens — lawyers, advice, and representation
additional: District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) — in every district
Supreme Court Legal Services Committee: sclsc.nic.in
